_comment: Drop your .gguf files in this folder and set 'file' to the exact filename. 'default' is the model the Ask Kobe assistant uses. Recommended chat model: Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (best JSON tool-calling + Swahili) with low temperature for reliable tool calls. Leave 'models' empty to auto-register every gguf as kobe-<filename>.

models.name: kobe-chat
models.system: You are Kobe, a concise business assistant for a Tanzanian shop. Reply in the user's language (Swahili or English).
